POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FOR TEMPORARY SPOUSAL SUPPORT RETROACTIVE TO THE DATE OF FILING THE COMPLAINT OR THE DECEMBER, 2001 MOTION FILED BY RESPONDENT ST. MARTIN, SCHERAZADE S.

AFTER ARGUMENT & SUBMISSION, THE COURT DENIED PETITIONER'S REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE. ADDITIONALLY, THE COURT GRANTED TEMPORARY S/S IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,000.00 PER MONTH, PETITIONER TO RESPONDENT, RETROACTIVE TO JANUARY, 2001. ACCORDINGLY, PETITIONER S/S ARREARS = $20,000.00. COURT ORDERED PETITIONER TO TAKE OUT A LINE OF CREDIT IN ORDER TO PAY THE $20,000.00 S/S ARREARAGE. RESPONDENT'S REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES IS GRANTED. AF = $10,000.00 PETITIONER TO RESPONDENT.
RESPONDENT'S REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES IS GRANTED. AF = $10,000.00 PETITIONER TO RESPONDENT.
